calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-01-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On February 18, 2003
Off Calendar Feb-25-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Ray Thomas, Esq., for Unocal Corporation
*The case came on regularly as scheduled for default prove-up hearing today. Counsel presents his case. Mr. Ray has supporting declaration. Case proceeds as a prove-up after discussion if accurate date of default was entered. The default was entered on 1/22/03 against Nadar Pakroo, individually and formerly dba Medina and Pakroo. The Court grants the default judgment in the following amount: $111,715.60, principle, $57,608.02, interest, $660, attorney fees, $726, costs. for a total judgment of $170,709.62. Judgment signed in open court. Commissioner Loretta M. Norris, Clerks: P. Dias/Dianne Boffi, Reporter: La Von Granger

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On February 18, 2003
Off Calendar Feb-18-2003 Continued To Feb-25-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Valerie Papale. The Court notes for the record that default was entered on January 22, 2003 against Medina & Pakroo. Witness appearance was excused by the Court but no original declaration by witness, in lieu of live testimony, is on file and therefore the matter is continued to February 25, 2003 at 09:00 A>M>

Defendant Nader Pakroo'S Motion For Relief From Default (Entered On January 7, 2000)
Off Calendar Nov-13-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- Defendant NADER PAKROO's motion for relief from default -- Motion GRANTED. Plaintiff Union Oil Co. of California's request for attorney's fees for $4,236.00 is granted. (JJM/301/AS/MD) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR 7855

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
